hero.title: Every drop is for you.
hero.body: Crimson & Cardinal is crafted at the heart of Napa Valley's Oakville appellation, where sun, soil, and meticulous winemaking converge to create a bottle worth sharing with the people who matter most.

metrics.sectionTitle: Made in small numbers, for the few.

features.title: Sunlight, Soil, Love & Craft
features.subtitle: From vineyard to glass, every step is intentional

cards.title: From Oakville, with intention
cards.body: Our Oakville vineyard sits at the heart of Napa Valley, with Harlan Estate to the south and To Kalon to the north. This unique location allows the hot sun and cool ocean breezes to be the most precious catalyst for each grape.

cards.title: Made with patience
cards.body: Each grape is rigorously selected and cultivated. Aged for 24 months in 100% new French oak barrels without any filtration. Barrels are replaced and racked to maximize richness and characteristic flavors.

cards.title: For moments worth sharing
cards.body: A wine born out of love, like life's finest moments — meant to be shared with family and friends. Crafted for private dinners, meaningful gifts, and those who appreciate simplicity and quality.

winemaker.name: Bobby Moy
winemaker.title: Bobby Moy - Winemaker
winemaker.bio: Growing up in wine country, I have never been far from the vine. I was fascinated with winegrowing from an early age. After working several harvests on the central coast of California, I went back to college for winemaking. I approach winemaking as an art form with its roots in science, balancing traditional and contemporary methods to produce an authentic expression of the site.

collection.title: Crimson & Cardinal Red Wine
collection.subtitle: 2021 Oakville · Napa Valley Cabernet Sauvignon
collection.body: This wine has the classic characteristics of a rare Napa Valley Cabernet Sauvignon. Tightly structured, delicate, elegant and smooth. We use hand harvesting and destemming to minimize intervention and allow the true character of the grapes to shine through.

items.title: Oakville Provenance
items.body: Sourced from the heart of Napa Valley, ensuring exceptional structure and depth.

items.title: Disciplined Craft
items.body: Aged 24 months in new French oak with minimal intervention to preserve natural character.

items.title: Limited Allocation
items.body: Deliberately small production volume guarantees meticulous attention to every barrel.

items.title: Quiet Luxury
items.body: Designed for private tables and seasoned collectors, avoiding unnecessary spectacle.

newsletter.title: Stay close to the next release
newsletter.body: Receive release updates, allocation news, and notes from the cellar.

contact.title: Send an Inquiry
contact.body: Interested in acquiring Crimson & Cardinal? Leave your details and we will get back to you.

orderModal.title: Book a Private Consultation
orderModal.body: Leave your contact details and our wine consultant will provide you with exclusive one-on-one service.
orderModal.successBody: Thank you for your interest. Our wine consultant will contact you within 24 hours.

footer.tagline: Napa Valley Cult Cabernet Sauvignon, crafted with love.
footer.address: 1824 Oakville Cross Road, Oakville, CA 94562 USA
